summary: Recent updates to Firefox have focused on improving media handling and audio features within the browser. Notably, the **implementation of the Picture In Picture API** allows users to watch videos in a small overlay while navigating other parts of the browser, enhancing multitasking capabilities. Additionally, improvements to handling audio—like the addition of the AudioSession WebIDL surface and better memory management methods—strengthen the overall performance of multimedia applications. These changes help create a more seamless and responsive experience when consuming content, keeping up with modern web expectations. _Overall, these adjustments are part of ongoing efforts to refine media playback and ensure a smoother user experience._
